_comment: Sephora SKU -> notes/accords/year; sadece { year } olan kayitlar piramidi degistirmez (merge sonrasi enrichmentSource ayni kalir). Calistir: node scripts/merge_sephora_overrides.mjs

P504364.short_description: Glossier You — skin-enhancing musk scent. Top: pink pepper; heart: iris root; base: ambrette, ambrox and musk. Wears close to the skin.

P508143.short_description: Juliette Has a Gun Ode to Dullness — floral musky woody. Top: star anise, freesia; heart: cashmere flower, sandalwood; base: musks, tonka bean.

P507947.short_description: PHLUR Mood Ring — playful fruity-floral. Top: pitaya, sweet orange, gourmand fruit; heart: orange flower, jasmine, marigold; base: patchouli, musks, amber.

P511605.short_description: DedCool 01 Taunt — creamy citrus-vanilla. Top: bergamot, dewy freshness; heart: floral, cassis; base: vanilla, amber.

P518577.short_description: Commodity Ice(d)+ Bold — icy mango and mint with warm depth. Top: frozen mango, spearmint; heart: eucalyptus, cardamom; base: tonka, amber.

P518575.short_description: Commodity Ice(d)- Personal — sheer aquatic skin scent. Top: frozen mango, spearmint; heart: eucalyptus, seaweed; base: skin musk, sandalwood.

P463959.short_description: Sol de Janeiro Cheirosa 71 — warm amber gourmand. Top: caramelized vanilla, sea salt; heart: toasted macadamia, white chocolate; base: tonka, coconut blossom.

P513541.short_description: Ariana Grande LOVENOTES Pink Woods — airy citrus woods. Top: bergamot, lotus; heart: jasmine, tea, vetiver; base: tonka, cashmere woods, cotton candy.

P511240.short_description: Charlotte Tilbury Calm Bliss — tranquil aquatic floral. Top: bergamot, neroli, lavandin; heart: orange flower, watery accord; base: tonka, white musks, orris.

P520173.short_description: BORNTOSTANDOUT Nanatopia — spicy gourmand banana. Top: cinnamon, nutmeg, rum; heart: banana bread, caramel; base: tonka, cypriol, Orcanox.
